description: This file defines the core authentication/session management class 'AuthManager' for an Android app. It handles operations like initialization, login, lock/unlock, logout, token refresh, and access token retrieval, managing session state and token persistence. It also exposes a flow for observing auth state changes.

classes.name: AuthManager
classes.description: Manages authentication sessions, token storage, and state transitions, providing methods for login, logout, lock/unlock, token refresh, and exposing auth state flow.

methods.name: authStateFlow
methods.description: Returns a flow of authentication state updates.

methods.name: currentState
methods.description: Provides a snapshot of the current authentication state.

methods.name: initializeFromStorage
methods.description: Loads persisted tokens from storage, sets initial session state accordingly.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Performs login using provided credentials and a result callback, then stores tokens and sets state.

methods.name: lock
methods.description: Locks the session, keeping tokens but requiring re-authentication.

methods.name: unlock
methods.description: Unlocks the current session after biometric/device credential verification.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Clears tokens and resets session to logged out state.

methods.name: getAccessTokenIfUnlocked
methods.description: Retrieves the access token if the session is unlocked.

methods.name: ensureFreshAccessToken
methods.description: Checks token validity, refreshes if expired, and updates session accordingly.
